sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ لُغَةٌ قَدِيمَةٌ وَغَنِيَّةٌ بِالمُفْرَدَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik je star jezik i bogat vokabularom.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is an ancient language rich in vocabulary.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ بِهَا مَلَايِينُ النَّاسِ فِي جَمِيعِ أَنْحَاءِ العَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Govore ga milioni ljudi širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people speak it all over the world.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَهَرَ العَرَبُ قَدِيمًا بِقَوْلِ الشِّعْرِ وَالفَصَاحَةِ فِي الكَلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi su u davna vremena bili poznati po kazivanju poezije i rječitosti u govoru.
sentences.translationEn: In ancient times, Arabs were famous for reciting poetry and eloquence in speech.

sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ العَرَبِيَّةُ لُغَةَ القُرْآنِ الكَرِيمِ، وَهَذَا أَعْطَاهَا مَكَانَةً خَاصَّةً.
sentences.translation: Arapski se smatra jezikom Časnog Kur'ana, što mu je dalo poseban status.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic is considered the language of the Holy Quran, and this has given it a special status.

sentences.arabic: يَهْتَمُّ الكَثِيرُ مِنَ الأَجَانِبِ بِتَعَلُّمِهَا لِفَهْمِ الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi stranci su zainteresovani za njegovo učenje kako bi razumjeli arapsku kulturu.
sentences.translationEn: Many foreigners are interested in learning it to understand Arab culture.
